title: App Store & Google Play Data Scraper input

searchQueries.title: Search queries
searchQueries.description: Keywords to search in selected stores.

appIds.title: Apple App Store app IDs
appIds.description: Apple numeric app IDs or bundle IDs. Example: 310633997.

packageNames.title: Google Play package names
packageNames.description: Google Play package names or app URLs. Example: com.whatsapp.

country.title: Country
country.description: Store country/region code, such as us or in.

includeRatingsSummary.title: Include ratings summary
includeRatingsSummary.description: Include aggregate ratings counts and histogram when available. Individual reviews are never output.

maxResults.title: Maximum app records
maxResults.description: Maximum clean app records to save across all selected sources.

userAgent.title: User-Agent
userAgent.description: Descriptive User-Agent for public API/page requests.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Recommended for Google Play. Apple iTunes API does not need a proxy.
